task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' styles to the main section titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Executive Summary', 'Current Landscape', 'Strategic Goals', and 'Regional Funding Allocation' appear visually distinct (larger/bold) and the style selector in the Calligra Words toolbar displays 'Heading 1' when the cursor is on these titles.
The text 'Infrastructure Gap' and 'Digital Literacy' appear visually distinct as subheadings and the style selector in the Calligra Words toolbar displays 'Heading 2' when the cursor is on them.

task_completion.description: Convert the manual dashed list under 'Strategic Goals' into a semantic bulleted list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list items under 'Strategic Goals' have standard bullet points (not manual dash characters '-') and the bulleted list formatting button in the Calligra Words toolbar is active/highlighted when the cursor is on the list.

task_completion.description: Convert the tab-separated data under 'Regional Funding Allocation' into a semantic table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data under 'Regional Funding Allocation' (containing numbers like 15%, 18,200, 14,100) is organized within a visible grid/table structure with distinct cells, rather than just being separated by blank spaces or tabs.

task_completion.description: Insert an automatic Table of Contents at the beginning of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block is visible at the very top of the document, automatically listing the styled headings (Executive Summary, Current Landscape, etc.) along with their corresponding page numbers.

task_completion.description: Save the remediated document as accessible_equity_plan.odt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words window title bar displays 'accessible_equity_plan.odt' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible showing this exact filename being saved in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Calligra Words graphical interface to remediate the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Calligra Words application window, menus, and toolbars, rather than terminal commands, pandoc scripts, or plain text editors.

integrity.description: The agent preserved the original document text rather than creating a dummy document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document content still contains the original text and keywords such as 'broadband development', 'digital equity', 'surveys', '15%', '18,200', and '14,100'.

integrity.description: The agent used semantic formatting tools rather than purely visual workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen using the style dropdown menu, list buttons, table insertion dialogs, and TOC generation tools in Calligra Words, rather than just manually changing font sizes, typing bullet characters, or drawing lines.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Output Path: /home/ga/Documents/accessible_equity_plan.odt. Expected Heading 1 strings: 'Executive Summary', 'Current Landscape', 'Strategic Goals', 'Regional Funding Allocation'. Expected Heading 2 strings: 'Infrastructure Gap', 'Digital Literacy'. Content keywords that must remain in the document: 'broadband development', 'digital equity', 'surveys', '15%', '18,200', '14,100'.
